Video.summary: See how, in prehistoric times, our ancestors' wide-ranging diet directly drove evolution.
Video.title: Hunting, Gathering, and Stone Age Cooking

Image.alt: Hunting, Gathering, and Stone Age Cooking
Hunting, Gathering, and Stone Age Cooking
Hunting, Gathering, and Stone Age Cooking

Video.summary: Explore the rise of agriculture, how plants and animals were domesticated.
Video.title: What Early Agriculturalists Ate

Video.summary: Learn how the first churches came into being, based architecturally on the secular pagan "basilica."
Video.title: The Earliest Churches

Video.summary: Trace the history of the building and of the medieval reconstruction we see today.
Video.title: The Church of the Holy Sepulchre

Image.alt: The Church of the Holy Sepulchre
The Church of the Holy Sepulchre
The Church of the Holy Sepulchre

Video.summary: What makes 1066 such a pivotal year in the history of Western civilization?
Video.title: The Norman Conquest through History

Video.summary: Take a closer look at the chaos between 1016 and 1066, when power was up for grabs.
Video.title: England and Normandy before the Conquest

Image.alt: England and Normandy before the Conquest
England and Normandy before the Conquest
England and Normandy before the Conquest

Video.summary: Consider the nature of Athenian democracy and how it functioned in practice.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Why Athenian Democracy Matters

Video.summary: Delve into Homer's epics to examine several early examples of democratic assembly.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: The Origins of Greek Democracy

Video.summary: Learn what the Dead Sea Scrolls are, the story of their unlikely discovery.
Video.title: The Discoveries and Their Significance

Video.summary: Discover more about how scholars gained access to the first seven scrolls discovered at Qumran.
Video.title: The First Seven Scrolls

Video.summary: How has Japanese culture been shaped by powerful cycles of globalization and isolation?
Video.title: Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation

Image.alt: Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation
Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation
Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation

Video.summary: Get an engaging introduction to ancient Japanese myths, collectively known as Shint? ("Way of the Gods").
Video.title: Understanding Japan through Ancient Myths

Video.summary: Examine the common preconceptions about Celtic identity.
Video.title: Who Are the Celts?

Video.summary: Our earliest written records of the Celts come from Italy, Greece, and Spain.
Video.title: The Celts and the Classical World

Video.summary: Begin with a look at two iconic spots: the Rock of Cashel and the Guinness Brewery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: A Destination like No Other

Video.summary: Investigate the origins of civilization in Ireland by visiting several ancient sites.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Prehistoric and Celtic Ireland

Video.summary: Begin your study of Einstein's mistakes by looking at what he got right.
Video.title: What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity

Image.alt: What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: Special Relativity

Video.summary: Einstein followed a rocky road to his breakthrough theory of relativity.
Video.title: What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity

Image.alt: What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity
What Einstein Got Right: General Relativity

Video.summary: Learn how the concept of black holes emerged from his theory of relativity.
Video.title: Einstein's Rejection of Black Holes

Video.summary: General relativity predicts that objects with mass radiate gravitational waves when they interact.
Video.title: Einstein and Gravitational Waves

Video.summary: Investigate what Einstein reportedly called his "biggest blunder".
Video.title: Cosmology and the Cosmological Constant

Video.summary: Einstein tried to make general relativity compatible with a static universe, a move he later regretted.
Video.title: The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy

Image.alt: The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy
The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy
The Cosmological Constant and Dark Energy

Video.summary: Einstein's major contributions to physics include his proof that light is made up of discrete quanta.
Video.title: What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta

Image.alt: What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta
What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta
What Einstein Got Right: Light Quanta

Video.summary: Probe Einstein's devotion to the principle of determinism.
Video.title: Does God Play Dice with the Universe?
